CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Status__c, "Completed (Offer Accepted / Need Met)") && ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Accepted"), "Completed", IF( ISPICKVAL(Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Status__c, "Completed (Offer Accepted / Need Met)") && ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "New"), "Declined", IF( ISPICKVAL(Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Status__c, "Expired") && ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Accepted"), "Completed", IF( ISPICKVAL(Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Status__c, "Expired") && ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "New"), "Expired", IF( ISPICKVAL(Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Status__c, "Cancelled") && ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "New"), "Cancelled", IF( ISPICKVAL(Need_Offer_Responded_To__r.Status__c, "Cancelled") && ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "Accepted"), "Cancelled", ""))))))
CustomField.label: Status Update Needed
